channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Anglican Priest Killed in Overnight Attack in Adamawa
item.description: Gunmen have killed Emmanuel Ezeokwe, an Anglican priest, in an attack that took place early on Tuesday morning at his vicarage in Zinai community, Song Local Government Area of Adamawa State. The assa...

item.title: Jeff Koinange recounts transition from aviation career to journalism
item.description: Veteran Kenyan media personality Jeff Koinange has shared detailed insights into how he transitioned from a promising aviation career into journalism, which later made him one of the most recognisable...

item.title: Australia’s Rental Market Faces Affordability Crisis as Renters Hit Their Limits
item.description: Australia's rental market may be reaching a tipping point as renters across capital cities face rising affordability challenges. According to a recent report by Domain, rental vacancy rates have falle...

item.title: PM Shehbaz congratulates Pakistani astronomers selected for China’s space programme, highlights future of space research
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met two Pakistani astronomers, Zeeshan Ali and Khurram Daud, who have been selected for China’s manned space programme, and congratulated them on this major achievement. ...

item.title: Australian Farmers Face Rising Mouse Numbers with Potential for Another Plague
item.description: Australia is grappling with a significant increase in mouse populations, reminiscent of the 2021 plague, particularly in Western and South Australia. Mouse numbers are reportedly hitting concerning le...

item.title: Delays in phasing out coal power in South Africa linked to major health and economic risks
item.description: A recent report by Greenpeace, the Centre for Research on Energy and Clean Air, and the South African NGO GroundWork warns that postponing the decommissioning of coal-fired power stations in South Afr...

item.title: UK cancer diagnoses reach record high, with one diagnosis every 80 seconds
item.description: The article reports that cancer diagnoses in the United Kingdom have reached their highest recorded level, with new cases being identified at an average rate of one every 80 seconds. This reflects a s...

item.title: Fans React to Murder Charges Against Singer D4vd
item.description: D4vd, a young musician who rose to fame through viral hits like 'Romantic Homicide,' is now at the center of a criminal investigation following the discovery of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez's b...

item.title: Delhi High Court Directs Google and X to Take Down Videos of Kejriwal's Court Proceedings
item.description: In a significant development, the Delhi High Court has directed tech giants Google and X (formerly Twitter) to remove videos of the court hearing related to Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal's ongo...

item.title: PM highlights energy security measures that averted crisis in Pakistan during Middle East conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif recently addressed a high-level meeting on energy security, emphasizing that the government's timely energy conservation measures helped avert a crisis in Pakistan amidst...

item.title: Mozilla Identifies 271 Firefox Vulnerabilities Using Anthropic’s AI Tool Amid Growing Cybersecurity Concerns
item.description: Mozilla announced that its Firefox 150 browser release includes fixes for 271 vulnerabilities that were identified using early access to Anthropic’s AI model, Mythos Preview. This development highligh...

item.title: Cables for Mayon Volcano Monitoring Equipment Stolen in Albay
item.description: Philippine authorities reported that several meters of power cables used for monitoring the Mayon Volcano in Albay were stolen. The theft was discovered by workers from the Mayon Volcano Observatory d...

item.title: Pope Leo concludes 11-day Africa tour focused on peace, justice, and political tensions
item.description: Pope Leo XIV concluded an 11-day tour across four African nations with a final Mass in Equatorial Guinea, capping one of the most eventful papal trips in recent history. The journey, which covered ove...

item.title: UNODC Calls for Stronger Asset Management and Regional Cooperation to Fight Corruption in Eastern Africa
item.description: During the 16th Eastern Africa Association of Anti-Corruption Authorities conference in Nairobi, the UNODC highlighted that weak asset management systems are limiting the impact of corruption recovery...

item.title: US Involvement in Mexico Raises Questions After Fatal Drug Raid
item.description: Details about a deadly drug raid in Mexico have led to growing speculation regarding the involvement of the United States in regional security operations. The incident, which reportedly resulted in mu...

item.title: Energy Week Exhibitions Open in Dodoma to Showcase National Energy Progress
item.description: In Dodoma, Tanzania, the Energy Week exhibitions were officially opened at the Parliament premises, organised by the Ministry of Energy and its institutions. Minister for Energy, Deogratius Ndejembi, ...

item.title: Shift towards broader welfare policies raises concerns about targeting and fiscal sustainability in Australia
item.description: The article argues that Australia’s social safety net is undergoing a significant shift under the Albanese government, moving away from its traditionally targeted welfare model towards a broader, more...

item.title: Duterte defence rejects ICC claim of state policy to kill, calls it baseless in war on drugs case
item.description: The defence team of former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte has strongly rejected the International Criminal Court’s (ICC) findings that a state policy to kill was behind the killings linked to hi...

item.title: Zanzibar Launches Marine Data Programme to Support Sustainable Ocean Investments
item.description: Zanzibar Government imetoa mpango maalumu wa kukusanya na kusimamia data kuhusu matumizi ya rasilimali za baharini, lengo likiwa kuendeleza uwekezaji endelevu katika uchumi wa buluu. Mpango huu, unaor...

item.title: Ex-domestic help allegedly enters Delhi IRS officer’s home and kills daughter after exploiting trust
item.description: A shocking case has emerged from south Delhi where a 19-year-old former domestic help has been accused of raping and killing the 22-year-old daughter of a senior Indian Revenue Service (IRS) officer. ...
